sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id INT, start_date DATE, interval_year INTERVAL YEAR);
INSERT INTO test_intervals (id, start_date, interval_year) VALUES (1, '2020-01-01', INTERVAL '5' YEAR);
UPDATE test_intervals SET start_date = start_date + interval_year WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, start_date, start_date + interval_year AS end_date FROM test_intervals;
